cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
